## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Copy from the spec; check off as they're met -->
- [ ]

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] **code-reviewer** pass run on the diff — findings + fixes noted in Reviews below
- [ ] **docs-reviewer** pass — required if `docs/`, `docs/learn/`, `README`, or `ONBOARDING` changed
- [ ] Verified on the Vercel preview deploy
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Reviews

- **docs-reviewer (if docs/learn touched):**
